narrative_beat: Medium lateral of gaunt P&B man in gray suit seated at narrow table with single gold-labeled GIN VITÓRIA bottle and ration can, giant telecrania eye on back wall

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a gaunt middle-aged man in a drab gray suit with tired face seated at a narrow formica table in a cramped apartment
subject.focal_point: on the table, a single rich gold-labeled glass bottle reading GIN VITÓRIA beside a dented ration can
subject.secondary: Behind him, a giant wall-mounted telecrania screen in P&B showing a stylized eye icon.

composition.foreground: bottle and ration label in rich gold and crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white Winston, room and telecrania

lighting.key_light: cold fluorescent overhead plus blue telecrania glow

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: no bank account — the Party owns everything

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: bold propaganda-era serif capital letters in warm printed gold
in_scene_text.medium: printed label on rectangular glass bottle
in_scene_text.placement: center of the bottle label facing camera

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
